description: MantisBT MCP server – manage issues, notes, files, tags, and relationships. With semantic search.
name: io.github.dpesch/mantisbt-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the MantisBT REST API, e.g. https://your-mantis.example.com/api/rest
environmentVariables.name: MANTIS_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: MantisBT API key (Profile → API Tokens in MantisBT)
environmentVariables.name: MANTIS_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Directory for the metadata cache. Defaults to ~/.cache/mantisbt-mcp
environmentVariables.name: MANTIS_CACHE_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Metadata cache TTL in seconds. Default: 3600 (1 hour)
environmentVariables.name: MANTIS_CACHE_TTL

environmentVariables.description: Transport mode. 'stdio' for local use (default), 'http' for remote/team deployments
environmentVariables.name: TRANSPORT

environmentVariables.description: Bind address when TRANSPORT=http. Default: 127.0.0.1 (local only). Use 0.0.0.0 for Docker/remote.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: Optional Bearer token to protect the /mcp endpoint when TRANSPORT=http
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Enable offline semantic search (requires ~80 MB model download on first use)
environmentVariables.name: MANTIS_SEARCH_ENABLED

environmentVariables.description: Vector store backend for semantic search. 'vectra' (default, pure JS) or 'sqlite-vec' (faster for >10k issues)
environmentVariables.name: MANTIS_SEARCH_BACKEND

environmentVariables.description: Directory for the semantic search index. Defaults to ~/.cache/mantisbt-mcp/search
environmentVariables.name: MANTIS_SEARCH_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Hugging Face model for embeddings. Default: Xenova/paraphrase-multilingual-MiniLM-L12-v2
environmentVariables.name: MANTIS_SEARCH_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: ONNX inference threads for the embedding model. Default: 1
environmentVariables.name: MANTIS_SEARCH_THREADS

environmentVariables.description: If set, restricts file uploads to this directory (path traversal protection)
environmentVariables.name: MANTIS_UPLOAD_DIR

title: MantisBT MCP Server
